profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Sepeda Bersama Indonesia Tbk engages in the trading of bicycles, electric motorcycle, baby stroller, and others in Indonesia. The company is involved in wholesale of sports equipment, land transportation equipment, and spare parts and equipment. It holds Genio Bike brand; distributes United Bike and Avand brand bicycles; and distributes electric motorcycle products under United E-Motor and United Motor brands. PT Sepeda Bersama Indonesia Tbk was founded in 2017 and is headquartered in South Tangerang, Indonesia.
